info.title: Solace Browser API
info.description: Local HTTP API for Solace Browser. All endpoints are served on localhost and require no authentication by default. The API powers the browser UI and is available for local integrations.

get.description: Returns this OpenAPI specification document.
Returns i18n strings for the given locale. Optionally filter by key.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Locale code (e.g. en, es, vi, zh, fr, ja, de, ar, hi, ko)

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Optional key to retrieve a single section

get.description: Returns the current user settings object.

put.description: Replaces the settings object with the provided payload.

get.description: Returns settings in a format suitable for cloud sync or backup.

post.description: Imports settings from a cloud sync or backup payload.

get.description: Returns the app catalog. Optionally filter by category or status.
Returns only apps with status 'installed'.
Returns full detail for a single app.
Returns pending inbox items for the app.
Returns completed outbox items for the app.
Returns the execution history for the app.
Returns Mermaid diagrams associated with the app.
Returns the current status of the app (installed, available, etc.).

post.description: Installs the specified app from the catalog.
Uninstalls the specified app.
Triggers execution of the specified app. Returns a run ID and preview.
Approves a pending action previewed by the app.

get.description: Returns the catalog sync state from the remote app store.
Returns submitted app proposals. Optionally filter by status.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of proposals to return

post.description: Submits a new app proposal to the store.

get.description: Returns the remaining LLM budget in USD.

post.description: Sets the LLM budget in USD.

get.description: Returns all scheduled automation tasks.
Returns tasks currently queued for execution.
Returns tasks scheduled to run next.

post.description: Creates or updates a scheduled automation plan.
Approves a scheduled run. Requires a valid CSRF token.
Cancels a scheduled run. Requires a valid CSRF token.

get.description: Returns the notification queue and unread count for the YinYang assistant.
Server-Sent Events stream for real-time YinYang notifications.

post.description: Sends a message to the YinYang AI assistant and returns a response. Requires an OpenRouter API key.
Pushes a notification to the YinYang notification queue.

get.description: Returns detected CLI agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini, etc.) and their install status.

post.description: Calls a CLI agent with a prompt and returns the response.

get.description: Returns evidence chain entries.
Returns available fun pack themes.

post.description: Downloads and installs a fun pack theme.

get.description: Returns OAuth3 tokens currently active.
Returns the available OAuth3 scopes.
Returns recent activity items.
Returns the current cloud tunnel connection status.

post.description: Starts the cloud tunnel connection.
Stops the cloud tunnel connection.

get.description: Returns system metrics for the local machine.
Lists files in the given scoped path.

post.description: Previews a terminal command. Actual execution is blocked until approved.

get.description: Returns the remote control configuration and connection status.
Returns the current remote access token.

post.description: Triggers an app run via remote control.
Approves a pending action via remote control.
Updates the remote control configuration.
Pushes local data to cloud sync.
Pulls cloud data to local.

get.description: Returns the electronic signature chain status from solaceagi.com.
Returns attestation records from solaceagi.com.

post.description: Requests an electronic signature token from solaceagi.com.
Signs a document or evidence bundle via solaceagi.com.
Verifies an electronic signature via solaceagi.com.

get.description: Returns the cloud sync status from solaceagi.com.

post.description: Pushes data to solaceagi.com cloud sync.
Pulls data from solaceagi.com cloud sync.

get.description: Returns the billing status from solaceagi.com.
Returns the user's subscription tier from solaceagi.com.

post.description: Pushes evidence bundles to solaceagi.com for cloud storage.
Requests account deletion from solaceagi.com. GDPR right to erasure.
Requests a full data export from solaceagi.com. GDPR right to data portability.

get.description: Returns items queued for execution while offline.

post.description: Flushes all pending offline queue items.

Settings.description: User settings object with account, LLM, history, and privacy configuration.

AppDetail.description: Full app detail including permissions, steps, and run history.

tags.name: Apps
tags.description: App lifecycle: list, install, run, approve

tags.name: YinYang
tags.description: AI assistant chat, notifications, and events

tags.name: Machine
tags.description: Local machine system info and file access

tags.name: Cloud
tags.description: solaceagi.com cloud proxy (eSign, sync, billing, GDPR)
